theme: Eating at Home vs. Eating Out

sentences.english: Some people prefer eating at home, while others prefer eating at restaurants.
sentences.korean: 어떤 사람은 집에서 먹는 걸 선호하고 다른 사람은 식당에서 먹는 걸 선호합니다.

sentences.english: Which do you prefer and why?
I personally prefer eating at home for several reasons.
sentences.korean: 개인적으로 여러 이유로 집에서 먹는 것을 선호해요.

sentences.english: First it's much cheaper to cook at home than to eat out.
sentences.korean: 첫째 집에서 요리하는 것이 외식보다 훨씬 저렴해요.

sentences.english: A meal that costs thirty dollars at a restaurant can be made at home for less than ten.
sentences.korean: 식당에서 30달러짜리 식사를 집에서 10달러 미만으로 만들 수 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Living with a Roommate vs. Living Alone
Eating at Home vs. Eating Out

theme: Eating at Home vs. Eating Out

sentences.english: Second I can control exactly what goes into my food which is better for my health.
sentences.korean: 둘째 음식에 뭐가 들어가는지 정확히 조절할 수 있어 건강에 더 좋아요.

sentences.english: I can use less oil and salt and choose fresh organic ingredients.
sentences.korean: 기름과 소금을 적게 쓰고 신선한 유기농 재료를 선택할 수 있어요.

sentences.english: Finally cooking is actually a relaxing activity for me after a long day at work.
sentences.korean: 마지막으로 요리는 사실 긴 하루 일과 후 나에게 편안한 활동이에요.

sentences.english: For these reasons I believe eating at home is the better choice.
sentences.korean: 이러한 이유로 집에서 먹는 것이 더 나은 선택이라고 생각해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Describe a place outside your actual home where yo
A Person Who Has Influenced You
Eating at Home vs. Eating Out
